auth.login_subtitle: Log in to continue your premium ride experience.
auth.agree_to_terms: I agree to all Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy
auth.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Enter the phone number linked to your account and we'll send you a reset code.
auth.otp_subtitle: Type in the 6 digit OTP code that was sent to you.
auth.create_new_password_subtitle: Choose a secure password you'll remember.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.

profile_setup.role_selection_title: How do you plan to use Chauffly?
profile_setup.passenger_description: Your comfort, safety, and peace of mind always first.
profile_setup.driver_description: Drive with dignity, professionalism, and higher earnings potential.
profile_setup.corporate_description: Perfectly managed rides for your team and clients.
profile_setup.ride_style_placeholder: Choose the ride type that suits your comfort level
profile_setup.accessibility_options_placeholder: Let your driver know if you need more assistance
profile_setup.facial_verification_description: For your safety, we use facial recognition to confirm it's really you during pickups and secure account actions. Your facial data is encrypted and stored securely.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_1: Capture your face once during setup.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_2: Used only for verification never shared with drivers.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_3: You can disable this anytime in Settings.
profile_setup.facial_verification_success_description: Your face has been securely registered. We'll use it for quick and safe verifications during rides.

onboarding.slide1_title:
Welcome to chauffly
Move With Confidence
onboarding.slide1_description: Enjoy premium rides, trusted chauffeurs, and a travel experience designed around comfort and safety.
onboarding.slide2_description: Choose from Go, Plus, Luxe, or Black — perfectly tailored rides for every moment, from everyday errands to executive travel.
onboarding.slide3_title: Your Security is Our Top Priority
onboarding.slide3_description: Verified drivers, real-time tracking, facial recognition, and instant sharing keep every trip secure.

location.enable_location_description: To be able to use the service, we require permission to access your location.
location.add_more_stops_question: Would you like to add another stop to your trip?
